name: Storz & Bickel Mighty+
summary: The reference portable for medical patients. Full convection, German-engineered, registered as a Class IIa medical device.
description: The Mighty+ is the gold-standard portable dry-herb vaporiser. Hybrid heating with full convection delivers a clinically consistent dose every time. USB-C charging, ceramic-coated chamber for purer flavour, faster heat-up than the original Mighty. Genuinely lasts a long medicating session on one charge. If you medicate multiple times a day, this is the device that pays back over years.
